meta.title: Patents and Economic Development: Examining the Success of the Patent Tigers
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with Professor Jonathan Barnett on the “patent tiger” phenomenon and the implications not only for developing countries seeking to build their economies, but also for the United States, which has significantly weakened its patent system over the past decade.
